data.title: Krystal Biotech to Report Second Quarter 2026 Financial Results on August 3, 2026
data.description: Krystal Biotech, Inc. revealed today its plan to disclose the financial results for the second quarter of 2026 on Monday, August 3, 2026, before the commencement of U.S. trading. The company, listed as KRYS on NASDAQ, is based in Pittsburgh.

data.title: embecta to Report Fiscal Third Quarter Financial Results
data.description: On July 23, 2026, in Parsippany, New Jersey, Embecta Corp. (Nasdaq: EMBC) announced its plans to host a conference call on August 7, 2026, at 8:00 a.m. Eastern Time. The call will focus on discussing the company's fiscal third-quarter 2026 financial results, offering an operational update, and including a question and answer session. Embecta Corp., a global entity with a 100-year heritage in insulin delivery, is currently in transition to diversify and become a comprehensive medical supplies provider.

data.title: Northview Residential REIT reveals July payout to investors.
data.description: In recent developments, it has been reported that approximately 50,000 homes in the surrounding areas have been affected by the ongoing wildfires, resulting in the evacuation of over 100,000 residents. The fires have devastated over 150,000 acres of land and have led to the destruction of more than 200 buildings. Emergency services are currently working tirelessly to contain the fires and ensure the safety of those affected.

data.title: Getty Images to Release Second Quarter 2026 Financial Results on August 10, 2026
data.description: On July 23, 2026, Getty Images Holdings, Inc. revealed its plan to unveil the financial outcomes for the second quarter of 2026 post-market closure on August 10, 2026. This announcement comes as the company aims to maintain its position as a leading global visual content producer and market player. The conference call is scheduled to occur at 4:30 p.m. (Eastern Time) on the same day, where solely prepared comments will be presented. Getty Images, traded as GETY on the NYSE, invites stakeholders to gain insights into its performance and strategic directions through this upcoming release and conference call.

data.title: Newcore Gold Announces Results from Annual General Meeting
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on July 23, 2026, Newcore Gold Ltd. (TSX-V: NCAU, OTCQX: NCAUF) announced the positive outcome of its Annual General Meeting. Shareholders supported all resolutions outlined in the Notice of Meeting and Information Circular from June 22, 2026.

data.title: ING Provides $268 Million Acquisition Facility to EQT Real Estate for Logistics Portfolio
data.description: In New York, ING Capital LLC has confirmed providing a fully underwritten $268 million acquisition facility to EQT Real Estate's Core Plus Fund IV. This financing has facilitated the fund's purchase of 11 top-tier logistics assets, encompassing a total of 2.8 million square feet spread across six rapidly expanding US logistics hubs. This deal strengthens the existing partnership between ING and EQT Real Estate in the US and European arenas. The portfolio of 11 assets in question is fully leased.

data.title: Toll Brothers Announces Grand Opening of New Design Studio in San Antonio, Texas
data.description: On July 23, 2026, Toll Brothers, Inc. (NYSE: TOL), the top luxury home builder in the nation, disclosed the launch of its latest Toll Brothers Design Studio in San Antonio, Texas. The grand opening event is scheduled for Friday, July 31, from 4 p.m. to 7 p.m. at 15337 San Pedro Avenue in San Antonio. The public is welcomed to join and enjoy light refreshments, cocktails, and hors d’oeuvres during the event.

data.title: Hims, The Surprise Winner Of The FDA Showdown With Peptides, Bounds Higher
data.description: The stock of Hims surged on Thursday following an FDA panel's suggestion to compound a well-liked peptide for injury recovery. This recommendation led to a significant increase in Hims' stock price. This development made Hims a surprise winner in the FDA showdown regarding peptides.

data.title: Alps Dx to Launch Xpressor™ by Alps Dx at ADLM 2026, a Fit-for-Purpose Filtration with Capping Solution Designed to Improve Oral Fluid Sample Quality and Preanalytical Efficiency
data.description: Alps Dx is set to enhance its oral fluid testing portfolio by introducing the Atelier™ automated preanalytical processing platform in addition to launching Xpressor™, a filtration with capping innovation. The company, based in RICHMOND, Va., revealed this news on July 23, 2026, via a press release. This move is part of their efforts to expand their offerings in the oral fluid testing sector.

data.title: MAIA MANAGEMENT GROUP ANNOUNCES SUMMER SHOWCASE AND RELAUNCH
data.description: On August 7, 2026, MAIA Management Group, LLC (MMG) is organizing a free event to mark over 30 years of influence and debut its extended regional strategy in Frederick, Maryland. The Summer Showcase & Relaunch will take place from 3 to 6 p.m. at FITCI, located at 321. Join in to celebrate the accomplishments and future plans of MMG.

data.title: Achieve named to Az Business Magazine's '10 Best Places for Women to Work in Arizona' for 2026
data.description: Achieve, a leading digital personal finance company based in San Mateo, California, was recently recognized for its dedication to providing women with opportunities for advancement and leadership. On July 23, 2026, Achieve was listed as one of the top 10 Best Places for Women to Work in Arizona by Az Business. This recognition underscores the company's commitment to fostering a supportive and inclusive work environment, further solidifying its reputation as a favorable workplace for women.

data.title: Coinbase now allows businesses to accept USDC payments from AI agents. They introduce AI trading tools and developer kit. Expanding financial support for AI.
data.description: In addition to implementing AI trading tools and a developer kit, the exchange has launched initiatives to create financial infrastructure for independent AI agents.
